summary: Completed testing of 3 new features: room resize, revision history, and PDF export. Backend revision endpoints working 100%. Frontend has critical issues with room selection and resize handles not appearing.

ui_bugs.issue: Room selection not working - clicking rooms does not apply .selected class
Blue corner resize handles not appearing when room is selected
Auto-save revisions on room updates not working - no new revisions created after room drag

integration_issues.issue: Complete resize feature broken - cannot select rooms or access resize handles
Cannot test comparison due to insufficient revisions from broken auto-save

passed_tests: Backend API endpoints (11/11 passed) including new revision endpoints
AI floor plan generation with Claude Sonnet 4.5
PDF export button present and clickable
Tab navigation between Floor Plan and Cost Estimate
Vastu score calculation and room-level scoring
Revision history GET endpoint returns proper structure
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix room selection logic in FloorPlanCanvas component - selectedRoom state not updating when rooms are clicked, preventing resize handles from rendering. Also fix auto-save revision functionality on room updates.
